visual_description: In a dimly lit room, a man in a white shirt and tie sits at a black table opposite a man whose back faces the camera, while a third man in a blue shirt sits to the right, fidgeting with his hands. A laptop, a black case, a sheet of paper, and a phone are placed on the table. The lighting casts a greenish hue over the scene.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a low, serious tone, and the ambient sounds of the room are faint.
